title: Is it Wise to Retain Welltower (WELL) in Your Portfolio Now?
text: Welltower (WELL) is set to gain from the senior housing recovery and strategic acquisitions. However, stiff competition and earnings dilution in the near term from asset dispositions are woes.

title: 7 REITs to Buy for a Bear Market
text: With fears of an economic downturn on the rise, investors should protect themselves with these REITs to buy for a bear market. The post 7 REITs to Buy for a Bear Market appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Welltower (WELL) Boosts Liquidity, Expands $5.2B Credit Facility
text: Welltower (WELL) upsizes and extends the maturity of its $5.2 billion unsecured credit facility. This move boosts its liquidity position and financial flexibility.

title: Welltower (WELL) Revises Q2 FFO Guidance, Adds $502M Property
text: Welltower (WELL) raises the midpoint of its Q2 FFO guidance based on better-than-anticipated Seniors Housing Operating (SHO) fundamentals.
